name: Direct Auto Buy LIC
description_short: Astoria, Queens-based auto broker helping customers lease or buy any vehicle. Financing available for all credit levels; no Social Security number required for pre-approval.
description_long:
Direct Auto Buy LIC is an auto broker and dealership operating out of Astoria, Queens, New York, at 31-07 14th Street. The business is led by owner Bruce Green, who is frequently cited by name in customer reviews for his hands-on involvement. No founding year is publicly documented, and the company holds no verified CDFI, HUD, or NFCC certifications — it operates as a private auto brokerage serving the greater New York City metro area rather than as a regulated financial institution.

The company's core offering is helping customers lease or purchase vehicles across all makes and models — new and pre-owned — while arranging financing on the customer's behalf. Unlike traditional dealerships tied to a single brand, Direct Auto Buy LIC functions as a middleman between buyers and a broader network of lenders and dealers. They accept trade-ins, handle lease buyouts and returns, and work with customers across all credit profiles, including those with thin or damaged credit histories. A prominently advertised feature is that no Social Security number is required to receive a pre-approval decision, which takes under 30 seconds according to their website.

What separates Direct Auto Buy LIC from a typical dealership is its positioning around transparency and convenience. The company advertises no hidden fees and no-haggle pricing, and offers home or office vehicle delivery in most cases, along with scheduled pick-up appointments. This model targets buyers who are wary of high-pressure dealership tactics. The reputation data backs this up: the business holds a 5.0-star rating across 233 Google reviews and 245 reviews on Birdeye — an unusually high consensus score for a retail auto operation.

For the right buyer, Direct Auto Buy LIC offers genuine value: quick pre-approval, flexibility on credit history, and a concierge-style experience through owner Bruce Green. However, there are meaningful limitations. No BBB profile was found, making third-party accreditation unverifiable. Pricing and fee structures are not publicly disclosed — as is common with brokers, costs are embedded in deal terms rather than listed transparently. The business also has no mobile app or customer portal, and its geographic reach appears limited to the New York City area. Buyers outside the metro area or those expecting a fully digital experience will find the service less accessible.
pros: 5.0-star rating across 233 Google reviews and 245 Birdeye reviews — exceptional and consistent customer satisfaction
No Social Security number required for pre-approval — accessible to immigrants, non-residents, and ITIN holders
Pre-approval issued in under 30 seconds with no hard pull implied
Works with all credit levels, including buyers with poor or limited credit history
Covers all makes and models — not restricted to a single brand or franchise
Home and office vehicle delivery available in most cases
Owner Bruce Green personally engaged with customers — frequently named in reviews for responsiveness
cons: No pricing or broker fee structure publicly listed — costs are embedded in deal terms and not disclosed upfront
No BBB profile found — third-party accreditation and complaint history cannot be verified
Service appears limited to the New York City metro area; not available to out-of-state buyers
No mobile app or customer-facing online portal identified
No founding year or verifiable company history available in public records
best_for: NYC-area buyers without a Social Security number who need auto financing
Customers with poor, thin, or nontraditional credit histories seeking vehicle leasing or purchase
Buyers who want to avoid traditional dealership pressure and prefer a broker-assisted, no-haggle process
First-time car buyers who want guided support through leasing or financing from a single point of contact
diagnosis: Direct Auto Buy LIC is best suited for New York City-area buyers — particularly immigrants, non-residents, or those with challenged credit — who need a flexible, low-friction path to leasing or buying a car. The no-SSN pre-approval and all-credit-welcome policy are genuine differentiators backed by a near-perfect review record. The main caveat is limited transparency: broker fees are not published, there is no BBB profile, and the service is geographically confined to the NYC metro area.
services: Auto financing assistance for all credit levels
Financing arrangement through third-party lender network
